name: sop-ft-orchestrate-plugin
description: Autonomous orchestrator for the full SOP fine-tuning pipeline: from annotated dataset to production-ready DDM + VLM models. Runs the complete Import → Augment → DDM Train → VLM Train → Evaluate → RCA loop, interprets RCA results, applies fixes, and iterates until success criteria are met. Uses the BP evaluation-ms HTTP API directly via the sop-evaluation-plugin.
